case_title: JOHNSON, KENNETH VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (ANDERSON)

docket_entries.description: MOTION REDUCED PAYMENT TO ZERO. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (ANDERSON) HEARING SET FOR NOV-15-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION REDUCED PAYMENT TO ZERO. OF NOV-15-2005, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (ANDERSON) $936.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $936.00, JUDGMENT SHALL BE REDUCED TO $0.00 IN THE EVENT DEFENDANT CAN GET PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL BILLS FROM SF GENERAL HOSPITAL REDUCED TO ZERO. THE PLAINTIFF WAS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES. PLAINTIFF INCURRED THE MEDICAL COST OF $936.00 AS A RESULT OF MEDICAL SERVICES PROVIDED AT SFGH DUE TO THE BUS ACCIDENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (ANDERSON) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SF (ANDERSON)
JUDGMENT OF 7/26/05 IS HEREBY REDUCED TO $0.00. THE DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY NEGOTIATED THE WAIVER OF THE SFGH BILL IN THE AMOUNT OF
$936.00 AS REQUESTED BY THE COURT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FAILURE TO APPEAR.
